data.title: California Man Sentenced for Defrauding $12,000,000+ From the Small Business Administration’s Disaster Loans Program
data.description:
A resident of California has been sentenced to almost four years in prison for his role in a Small Business Administration (SBA) Economic Injury Disaster Loan (EIDL) fraud scheme. According to the U. S. Department of Justice (DOJ), Abraham Park of La Mirada, California, submitted over 120 fraudulent SBA EIDL applications worth $12 million from 2020-2022
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/08/california-man-sentenced-for-defrauding-12000000-from-the-small-business-administrations-disaster-loans-program/

data.title: Chainlink Rallies 15% in 24 Hours as Analysts Flip Bullish: Analysts are Now Watching This Price Target
data.description:
In a dramatic turn of events, Chainlink experienced a remarkable surge, rallying an impressive 15% within just 24 hours. This sudden uptick has caught the attention of market analysts, who have subsequently adjusted their outlooks and turned bullish on the cryptocurrency. As the excitement builds around this positive trend, analysts are now closely monitoring specific price targets that could indicate the future trajectory of Chainlink's performance in the market.
source: https://blocknews.com/chainlink-rallies-15-in-24-hours-as-analysts-flip-bullish-analysts-are-now-watching-this-price-target/

data.title: Bitcoin’s longest running market pattern threatened by new investor base and regulation
data.description:
Bitcoin’s four-year rhythm is slipping. A new mix of investors and policy moves is changing how the market trades and when it moves. If that pattern breaks, timing entries gets trickier for everyone who watches Bitcoin’s cycles. Matthew Hougan, chief investment officer at Bitwise Asset Management, said, “It’s not officially over until we see positive […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-longest-running-pattern-threatened/
